title: Acinos grandiflorus
taxonomy: Acinos grandiflorus is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It belongs to the genus Acinos, which is a group of plants native to the Mediterranean region. The species is further classified as a member of the order Lamiales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The family Lamiaceae, to which Acinos grandiflorus belongs, is commonly known as the mint family due to its numerous members with mint-like characteristics. Within the family, Acinos grandiflorus is also classified as a member of the tribe Nepetoideae.
